name: Google Gemini
description: Generate content, create embeddings, and count tokens with Google Gemini
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The Google Gemini API action to perform.

model.label: Model
model.description: Model name. Used by: Generate Content, Create Embedding, Count Tokens.

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.description: Text prompt for generation, embedding, or token counting.

systemInstruction.label: System Instruction
systemInstruction.description: System instruction for the model. Used by: Generate Content.

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.description: Sampling temperature (0-2). Used by: Generate Content.

maxOutputTokens.label: Max Output Tokens
maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum tokens in the response. Used by: Generate Content.

text.description: Generated text or token count result
